TxInputSummary.description: Tier 1 (redeemerRaw, redeemerConstr) is always present for script inputs; Tier 2 (redeemerKind, redeemerPayload) is only populated when the TestingInterface instance overrides redeemerTagger. All four redeemer fields are nullable (null for non-script inputs, or when Tier 2 is not opted in).

description: A single NDJSON line from the sc-tools test streaming reporter
title: SC-Tools Streaming Event
